Uluwatu is for guests who want gear included: from €349, 7 nights — everything in Malibu, plus 6 full days of surfboard and wetsuit rental from local partners. Waimea is best if you want lessons: from €499, 7 nights — everything in Malibu, plus 6 morning surf school lessons (about 12 hours weekly) and surfboard + wetsuit rental all week from local partners.
